title: Riot Platforms Inc (RIOT) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Surging Profits
text: Riot Platforms delivered impressive financial results for Q1 2024. The company generated $79.3 million in Q1 2024, up 18% YoY in total revenue. More dramatically, net income surged to $211.8 million compared to just $18.5 million in the prior year period, while earnings per share climbed to $0.82 from $0.11. The company's Bitcoin holdings grew substantially, ending the quarter with 8,490 bitcoins versus 7,094 a year earlier. However, actual mining output declined significantly. Bitcoin mined fell to 1,364 from 2,115, a 36% decrease attributed to rising network difficulty. Mining economics showed mixed results with the company achieving a 45% gross margin on its mining segment while costs per Bitcoin mined increased to $23,034 due to network challenges. Management emphasized commitment to expansion, targeting 31 exahash of self-mining capacity by year-end. The company successfully activated its Corsicana facility and ceased Bitcoin sales early in 2024, prioritizing balance sheet strength. The engineering business segment contracted significantly, with revenue falling from $16.1 million to $4.7 million due to global supply chain delays. Leadership reiterated its low-cost producer positioning and indicated reduced interest in expanding its hosting business going forward.
